inputs.label: Scale Length
inputs.businessContext: The distance from the nut to the bridge saddle, typically measured in millimeters.

inputs.label: Total Frets
inputs.businessContext: The total number of frets on the instrument fingerboard.

inputs.label: Compensation
inputs.businessContext: Additional length added to the scale length for intonation compensation at the bridge.

formulas.fretSpacing: fretNumber > 1 ? (((scaleLength + compensation) - ((scaleLength + compensation) / Math.pow(2, fretNumber / 12))) - ((scaleLength + compensation) - ((scaleLength + compensation) / Math.pow(2, (fretNumber - 1) / 12)))) : ((scaleLength + compensation) - ((scaleLength + compensation) / Math.pow(2, fretNumber / 12)))
